title: Temporal Localization Task Annotation
description: Temporal grounding task for videos: given a natural-language query describing an event, predict the start and end timestamps of that event within the video.

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

items.description: Array of temporal localization items, one per question-answer pair

video_id.description: Reference to video ID (matches directory name in contextual/)

video_type.description: High-level content classification of the video

t1.description: Event start time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '01:30', '00:01:30', '01:30.5')

t2.description: Event end time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '01:30', '00:01:30', '01:30.5')

question.description: Natural-language question asking when a specific event occurs in the video

answer.description: Predicted temporal span as a structured object with start and end timecodes

start.description: Predicted start time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds

end.description: Predicted end time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds

reasoning.description: Optional step-by-step reasoning trace leading to the answer

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search

items.question: When does the side-impact collision between the dark pickup truck and the turning silver sedan occur? Please provide the result in json format with 'HH:MM:SS.ff' format for time depiction for the event. Use keywords 'start', 'end' in the json output.
items.reasoning: The video begins with a stable baseline of urban traffic flow at a busy intersection. From 00:00:00 to 00:00:02, traffic on the main thoroughfare proceeds straight with the right-of-way...

metadata.description: Temporal localization of anomalous traffic events (collisions, near-misses) in ITS videos
